query:
WITH ins AS (
              INSERT INTO ds_collision_tag (group_id, epoch, tag)
              SELECT $1, $2, unnest($3::bigint[])
              ON CONFLICT (group_id, epoch, tag) DO NOTHING
              RETURNING tag
          )
          SELECT u.tag AS "tag!"
          FROM unnest($3::bigint[]) AS u(tag)
          EXCEPT
          SELECT tag FROM ins
